title: MiOS package manifest (WS-A17)
description: A versioned, self-describing wrapper around ONE MiOS capability (a verb/tool, an agent, or a recipe). Projected from the live SSOT (mios.toml / agent registry / recipes) by mios_registry; materialized at ai/v1/packages/<author>/<name>/<version>/mios-pkg.toml when [ai].package_registry is enabled.

manifest.description: A stable subset of the capability's SSOT entry so the package is self-describing.
